{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Laraena
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Laraena]] is the [[Blue Knight]] and an [[Aethril]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c2">''The Knight'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Laraena]] can call ice.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c7">''The Knight'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
